title: audit4me configuration (v1)
description: Per-project audit4me configuration. Lives at .code4me/audit4me-config.json. Declares which vendors are available, audit scope, category preferences, cost/time boxes, confidence thresholds, and apply-integration policy.

$schema.description: Schema version. Bumped when config shape changes incompatibly.

vendors_available.description: Vendors this project may use for auditing. The 2-vendor floor is a runtime constraint (single-vendor mode surfaces findings but cannot auto-propose fixes), not a schema constraint — single-vendor is a legal config for find-only mode.

default_categories.description: Audit categories run by default when /audit4me-run is invoked without explicit category flags.

max_files_per_run.description: Files-box. Caps how many files are audited per run. Useful for incremental runs.

max_cost_usd_per_run.description: Cost-box. Caps USD spend per run; computed from token counts × per-vendor pricing. When hit, the run commits partial state and exits.

max_runtime_per_run.description: Time-box. Wall-clock cap (e.g., 30m, 4h, 7200s). When hit, the run commits partial state and exits.

rules_version.description: Semver of the audit-prompts ruleset. When prompts materially change, bump this; all files become stale for re-audit.

refresh_interval_days.description: Files audited longer ago than this enter the next run's work set even if content unchanged.

concurrency_cap.description: Max number of per-file audit orchestrators dispatched in parallel. Higher caps run more files in parallel but multiply token burn rate and may hit vendor rate limits.

include.description: Glob patterns for files in scope. Evaluated relative to project root.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude. Applied after include.

propose_fix_min_severity.description: Minimum severity at which a proposed fix is attached to a finding. Lower severities are surfaced for review only.

propose_fix_requires_failing_test.description: If true, the auditor must have written a failing test demonstrating the bug for a fix to be auto-proposed.

propose_fix_requires_all_available_vendo.description: If true, all vendors in vendors_available must independently flag the finding for a fix to be auto-proposed (unanimous within available vendors).

dispatch_mode.description: Default code4me workflow weight used when /audit4me-apply <finding_id> dispatches a fix. Auto-escalation triggers may override per finding.

auto_escalate_categories.description: Findings in these categories dispatch as Standard (full Tech Spec + quality gates) regardless of dispatch_mode default.
